message:
Add TimelineSkeleton and StatsDashboardSkeleton components

- Created loading skeleton for TranscriptTimeline with section groups
- Added StatsDashboardSkeleton for 6-stat grid loading state
- Both match actual component structure for seamless transitions
- Used pulse animation variant from existing Skeleton component
- Updated index.ts exports

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-hmi (helper components)
Also closes: jeffreysprompts.com-e6b, jeffreysprompts.com-23a, jeffreysprompts.com-hwc
